element_introduction_order.mastery_context: player chooses team composition and player types
can be disabled via secret trick (A+B on both controllers + Start)
friction slows puck; can be disabled via secret trick (A+B on both controllers + Start at team selection)
goal triggers victory jingle; game continues with adjusted score

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: continuous play with natural relief points at goal events and period transitions

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: hidden cheat codes (A+B controller input) modify core mechanics: remove goalies or disable friction

difficulty_curve.early_game: team selection allows difficulty scaling via player type choices
difficulty_curve.mid_game: match difficulty depends on selected team composition and opponent AI

notable_level_patterns.description: Single match gameplay with periods, scoring, and continuous play. Not level-based; single arena environment.
Core mechanics (goalie presence, puck friction) can be toggled via hidden input sequences, allowing for simplified or advanced play

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor (Ice Hockey NES/FDS article)
